aniva.title: Маяк Анива
aniva.subtitle: Легендарный маяк на скале в открытом море
aniva.prompt: Photorealistic photo editing task: place THIS exact person into the Aniva Lighthouse scene on Sakhalin. IDENTITY — TOP PRIORITY, must be unmistakable: image 1 is the person FACE, image 2 is their BODY BUILD. The generated face must clearly and recognizably be the SAME PERSON as in image 1 — same bone structure, same eye shape and colour, same nose, same mouth and lips, same eyebrows, same face shape and skin tone; anyone must recognise them from image 1. You MAY gently clean the skin (reduce webcam noise, soften minor blemishes) and sharpen detail, but you must NOT change the identity or morph the face into a generic or different-looking person. Match their true body build from image 2 (not heavier, not slimmer). PROPORTIONS — very important: render a FULL-LENGTH standing adult with correct natural human proportions. The HEAD must be SMALL relative to the body — about one-seventh to one-eighth of the total head-to-toe height. Do NOT enlarge the head, do NOT zoom into the face, no big-head or bobblehead look. The body is tall and complete from head to shoes, legs and torso full-length and correctly scaled. ENVIRONMENT — image 3 is the BASE photograph: keep the same background, lighthouse, rocks, sea, sky and birds, the same camera angle, framing, perspective and composition EXACTLY; do not re-imagine or re-compose the scene. POSE: the person stands on the rocks in the lower foreground at believable scale, natural relaxed pose, body turned slightly, weight on one leg, one hand casually in a pocket, a light friendly CLOSED-MOUTH smile (lips gently together, no visible teeth). Outfit: {OUTFIT}. The person is a {GENDER}. Match the lighting of image 3 (warm coastal daylight, same direction, shadows and colour grading); soft realistic contact shadows under the feet. ULTRA-REALISTIC professional DSLR quality: sharp focus on the face, fine natural skin texture with pores, crisp and clean — no blur, no waxy or plastic skin, no over-smoothing, no artifacts, no AI look. Seamless blending with correct depth and perspective. Remove tattoos, marks or blemishes on the skin. Strictly no text, captions, logos, borders, extra people, warped anatomy, no cut-out collage look, and no changes to the background scene.

tikhaya.title: Бухта Тихая
tikhaya.subtitle: Хребты и залив у подножия гор
tikhaya.prompt: Place the PERSON from the portrait photorealistically at Tikhaya Bay on Sakhalin — a calm sea inlet at the foot of steep green-grey mountain ridges, pebble shoreline. Preserve their identity exactly. Vertical DSLR travel photo. No text, logos, frames, extra people or distortions.

velikan.prompt: Place the PERSON from the portrait photorealistically at Cape Velikan on Sakhalin — spectacular sea stacks and natural rock arches rising from the turquoise Sea of Okhotsk. Preserve their identity exactly. Vertical DSLR travel photo. No text, logos, frames, extra people or distortions.

chertov_most.title: Чёртов мост
chertov_most.subtitle: Инженерное чудо Сахалинской железной дороги

Preserve their identity exactly. Vertical DSLR travel photo. No text, logos, frames, extra people or distortions.

klokovsky.title: Клоковский водопад
klokovsky.subtitle: Падающая вода у берега моря

Preserve their identity exactly. Vertical DSLR travel photo. No text, logos, frames, extra people or distortions.
